description: WhatsAnima Call Intent Grammar — Multilingual intent recognition for avatar call triggers

call_now.description: User wants the avatar to call them immediately

call_delayed.description: User wants the avatar to call them after a delay

call_suggested.description: Avatar proactively suggests switching to a call

call_scheduled.description: User wants a call at a specific time (e.g. 'call me at 3pm')

de.label: Deutsch

call_now: Hey bro, kannst du mich jetzt anrufen?
Lass uns lieber per Anruf quatschen
Lass uns reden, ruf mich an
call_delayed: Ruf mich in zehn Minuten an
Kannst du mich in einer halben Stunde anrufen?
Ruf mich in einer Stunde an
Ruf mich in ein paar Minuten an

avatar_suggest_triggers: Das ist ein komplexes Thema, lass uns das lieber per Anruf besprechen
Ich glaube, wir sollten lieber telefonieren — soll ich dich anrufen?
Das erkläre ich dir besser im Gespräch. Darf ich dich kurz anrufen?
Ich merke, das Thema braucht mehr Tiefe. Soll ich dich anrufen?

en.label: English

call_now: Hey bro, can you call me right now?
I'd rather talk on a call
Can we talk instead of texting?
I wanna talk to you, call me
call_delayed: Can you call me in half an hour?
Give me 15 minutes then call me
Call me in a few minutes
Ring me in a couple of minutes

avatar_suggest_triggers: This is getting complex, let me call you so we can talk it through
I think we should hop on a call — want me to ring you?
This is better explained in a conversation. Can I call you?
I can tell this topic needs more depth. Should I call you?

es.label: Español
avatar_suggest_triggers: Esto se está poniendo complejo, mejor te llamo y lo hablamos
Creo que deberíamos hablar por llamada — ¿te llamo?
Esto te lo explico mejor hablando. ¿Te puedo llamar?
Noto que este tema necesita más profundidad. ¿Te llamo?

rules.description: A call verb + me pronoun in any form
A call verb alone without me (e.g. 'ruf an', 'call')
Suggesting switching from text to call
rules.pattern: contains(['lieber', 'rather', 'mejor', 'statt', 'instead', 'vez de']) AND contains(call_nouns OR call_verbs)

rules.description: Call verb + delay indicator + number + time unit
rules.pattern: contains(call_verbs) AND contains(delay_indicators) AND contains(number_or_digit) AND contains(time_units)

rules.description: Call verb + delay indicator + word number + time unit
rules.pattern: contains(call_verbs) AND contains(delay_indicators) AND contains(number_words) AND contains(time_units)

rules.description: Call verb + vague time (later, nachher, más tarde)
Question asking if avatar can call (können/can/puedes + call verb)

avatar_proactive_call_conditions.description: Conditions under which the avatar should suggest switching to a call

triggers.description: Long back-and-forth on one topic suggests a call would be faster
High emotional intensity detected via OPM suggests voice would be better
Complex topic with many questions — better in real-time
User expresses confusion or feeling overwhelmed

delay_parser.description: How to parse delay from user message
steps: 2. Find number (digit or number_word) after delay_indicator
5. If number_word is fractional (halb/half/media), multiply accordingly
6. If no number found but 'later/später/luego' present, default to 300s (5 min)
8. Cap maximum delay at 86400 seconds (24 hours)

de.call_now_confirm: Alles klar, ich rufe dich jetzt an.
de.call_delayed_confirm: Verstanden, ich rufe dich in {delay_human} an.
de.call_suggest: Hey, ich merke, das Thema ist komplex. Soll ich dich kurz anrufen? Dann können wir das besser besprechen.
de.call_failed: Ich konnte die Verbindung leider nicht aufbauen. Versuch es nochmal oder schreib mir einfach weiter.

en.call_suggest: Hey, I can tell this topic needs more depth. Want me to call you? It'll be faster to talk it through.
en.call_failed: Couldn't connect the call. Try again or we can keep chatting here.

es.call_suggest: Oye, noto que este tema necesita más profundidad. ¿Te llamo? Será más rápido hablarlo.
es.call_failed: No pude conectar la llamada. Inténtalo de nuevo o seguimos por chat.
